title: stelis straminea
intro: Stelis straminea is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, known for its distinctive yellow or greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis straminea include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and wounds, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through decoctions or infusions, often in combination with other plants, to leverage its medicinal properties.
